SEAL
HERE

(Council / Kingdom Name)

PERMISSION TO OCCUPY

Communal Land Allocation Certificate

PTO-______-___
Occupant
Stand
This Permission to Occupy is hereby granted by ___________________________ (council) to ___________________________ for the occupation of stand ___________________________ within the jurisdiction of the above council, effective from _______________. The holder of this document is authorised to occupy the above stand in accordance with the council's land allocation policy. This paper PTO remains valid until a digital PTO is issued and supersedes it.
Council Secretary — Name & Signature & Date
Occupant — Name & Signature & Date
Land2Living Community Registry — paper PTO template v1.0 — 2026 — This form must be signed by the council secretary and bear the council seal to be valid.
